mapper.select: SELECT d.*, u.real_name AS leader_name FROM sys_dept d LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON d.leader_id = u.id WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC
SELECT d.*, u.real_name AS leader_name FROM sys_dept d LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON d.leader_id = u.id WHERE d.parent_id = #{parentId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC
SELECT id FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 1 AND (id = #{deptId} OR ancestors LIKE concat('%', #{deptId}, '%'))
SELECT dept_id FROM sys_role_dept WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
